SCP 0.1.3
  • Reference

    Differential gene test

    RunDEtest.Rd

    Differential gene test

    RunDEtest(
  srt,
  group_by = NULL,
  cell_group1 = NULL,
  cell_group2 = NULL,
  FindAllMarkers = TRUE,
  FindPairedMarkers = FALSE,
  test.use = "wilcox",
  only.pos = TRUE,
  fc.threshold = 1.5,
  min.pct = 0.1,
  max.cells.per.ident = Inf,
  latent.vars = NULL,
  slot = "data",
  assay = "RNA",
  BPPARAM = BiocParallel::bpparam(),
  progressbar = TRUE,
  force = FALSE,
  ...
)

    Arguments

    srt

    A Seurat object

    group_by

    group_by

    cell_group1

    cell_group1

    cell_group2

    cell_group2

    FindAllMarkers

    Whether to find markers across all cells.

    FindPairedMarkers

    Whether to find markers between pairs of the cell groups.

    fc.threshold

    fc.threshold

    min.pct

    min.pct

    force

    force

    ...

    Examples

    library(dplyr)
data(pancreas1k)
pancreas1k <- RunDEtest(pancreas1k, group_by = "CellType")
#> [2022-06-21 07:02:51] Start DEtest
#> Threads used for DE test: 1
#> Perform FindAllMarkers(wilcox)...
#> 
  |                                                                            
  |                                                                      |   0%
  |                                                                            
  |======================================================================| 100%
#> 
#> [2022-06-21 07:03:10] DEtest done
#> Elapsed time: 18.41 secs 

# Heatmap
de_filter <- filter(pancreas1k@tools$DEtest_CellType$AllMarkers_wilcox, p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 1)
ExpHeatmapPlot(pancreas1k, genes = de_filter$gene, gene_groups = de_filter$group1, cell_group_by = "CellType")
#> 'magick' package is suggested to install to give better rasterization.
#> 
#> Set `ht_opt$message = FALSE` to turn off this message.


# Dot plot
de_top <- de_filter %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  top_n(1, avg_log2FC) %>%
  group_by(group1) %>%
  top_n(3, avg_log2FC)
ExpDotPlot(pancreas1k, genes = de_top$gene, gene_groups = de_top$group1, cell_group_by = "CellType")

    Contents
